special_attack_id.description: Optional rarer/harder-hitting attack usable at most once per combat encounter.

night_respawn_ticks.description: Optional respawn delay (in ticks) used instead of 'respawn_ticks' while the world clock is at night. Omit for no change at night.

wanders.description: When true the mob may randomly wander between linked rooms each tick. NPCs (tag 'npc') never wander.

summon_duration_ticks.description: Marks this template as a summonable pet: its lifetime (in ticks) once summoned. Pet templates are never spawned into the world at start-up and never respawn — an instance exists only while a player's SUMMON is active. Omit for ordinary world mobs.

charmable.description: When true the mob may be permanently captured as a companion via the TAME command. Omit or set false for mobs that cannot be tamed.

dialogue_id.description: Optional id of a dialogue tree (data/dialogues/) this NPC offers via the TALK command. Omit for mobs with no conversation.

faction_id.description: Optional id of a faction (data/factions/) this mob belongs to. Slaying the mob shifts the killer's reputation with the faction, and the faction's hostility rules govern whether it engages a given player. Omit for faction-neutral mobs.
